approaches.question: Q1
approaches.name: Murphy cost-loss decision framework
approaches.summary: Translate prob_up=p into action via cost/loss ratio threshold p≥C/L; threshold set by operator economics, not forecast.

approaches.question: Q1
approaches.name: Platt scaling / isotonic regression calibration
approaches.summary: Post-hoc calibration of model probabilities. Isotonic regression preferred when ≥1000 calibration points; Platt for sigmoid + small data.

approaches.question: Q1
approaches.name: Reliability diagram + Murphy decomposition
approaches.summary: Decompose Brier into reliability + resolution + uncertainty; reliability diagram plots empirical event-frequency vs predicted probability.

approaches.question: Q1
approaches.name: Categorical thresholding (ACTIONABLE/WEAK/NEUTRAL)
approaches.summary: Drop continuous probability output; expose only banded labels with explicit qualification rules.

approaches.question: Q1
approaches.name: Brier 0.25 = no-skill baseline (anchor finding)
approaches.summary: A Brier score of 0.25 is exactly the score of an uninformative 50/50 forecast for binary events. Our 0.247 ≈ 0.250 is at the no-skill baseline.
approaches.note: Brief framing of '0.247 = marginally useful' is not supported by standard proper-scoring-rule semantics. Operator's pain ('не приносит пользы') is consistent with the standard.

approaches.question: Q2
approaches.name: FreqTrade informative_pairs + @informative decorator
approaches.summary: Strategy declares additional (pair, timeframe) tuples; @informative('1h') auto-merges higher-TF indicators with proper time-shifting to avoid look-ahead bias.

approaches.question: Q2
approaches.name: Jesse multi-timeframe (look-ahead-safe)
approaches.summary: Higher-TF data delivered with closed-bar lag. Strict look-ahead prevention by design.

approaches.question: Q2
approaches.name: ICT killzones + multi-timeframe
approaches.summary: Predefined intraday windows where institutional activity peaks; combined with daily/4h/1h structure.

approaches.question: Q2
approaches.name: Confluence MTF (major-trend, minor-entry)
approaches.summary: Major TF for trend, minor TF for entry; disagreement → no signal. Standard retail wisdom.

approaches.question: Q3
approaches.name: Hidden Markov Models for regime classification
approaches.summary: Classic two/three-state HMM (bull/bear/transition). Filtered probability for live operation. Periodic retraining required.
approaches.note: No high-confidence peer-reviewed evidence of HMM consistently beating naive baselines on out-of-sample crypto

approaches.question: Q3
approaches.name: Volatility-regime activation rule (ATR-based)
approaches.summary: Composite regime label {trend × ATR%}; strategies enabled only in compatible cells. QuantMonitor reports Up_LowVol activates 95% of period; Down_* cells disable trading.

approaches.question: Q3
approaches.name: Indicator-gated entry as opportunity filter
approaches.summary: Indicator gate (e.g. PRICE % < -0.3%) flips bot sign. Activate at opportunity moment, not continuously.

approaches.question: Q4
approaches.name: Human-in-the-Loop AI for trading decision support
approaches.summary: Recommendations + anomaly surfacing + human approval gate. Anchored by 2010 Flash Crash and 2012 Knight Capital lessons.

approaches.question: Q4
approaches.name: Cognitive-load-aware dashboard design
approaches.summary: Sweller CLT applied to trading UI: group similar info, consistent navigation, minimize working-memory load.

approaches.question: Q4
approaches.name: RAG-grounded decision rules
approaches.summary: LLM consults a knowledge base (regulation doc) before answering; rule-based explanations link sources to outputs.
approaches.note: Hallucination cost in trading is high; needs careful eval

approaches.question: Q4
approaches.name: TradingAgents multi-agent LLM framework
approaches.summary: Seven LLM-powered agents (fundamentals, sentiment, news, technical, researcher, trader, risk-manager) collaborate via LangGraph.

approaches.question: Q5
approaches.name: Range-bound activation + breakout deactivation
approaches.summary: Grid bots thrive in sideways markets; breakout above/below boundary = deactivate. ATR for volatility-aware spacing.

approaches.question: Q5
approaches.name: Hanlon FSC / Stevens grid trading study + arXiv SL/TP optimization
approaches.summary: Stevens project optimized BTC grid bots on Bybit. >900-trade arXiv study favors tighter loss limits, earlier profit capture, closer trailing.

approaches.question: Q5
approaches.name: AI-optimized grid parameter framework (LSTM)
approaches.summary: LSTM consumes indicator features and outputs grid parameters.
approaches.note: No peer review; opaque output replaces evidence-driven configs

approaches.question: Q5
approaches.name: Infinity grid bot
approaches.summary: Removes upper boundary; bot continues buying/selling as price rises. For long-bullish markets.

approaches.question: Q6
approaches.name: Tiered alert classification (severity-based)
approaches.summary: Three-tier (severe/moderate/minor) with interruptive vs passive delivery. Healthcare CDS standard.

approaches.question: Q6
approaches.name: AI-tiered Early Warning (AI-TEW) two-stage ML thresholds
approaches.summary: Two-stage ML model: severity classification + context-aware threshold optimization.

approaches.question: Q6
approaches.name: Information-theoretic alert filtering (KL/entropy)
approaches.summary: Score interestingness via KL divergence between current and baseline distributions.

approaches.question: Q6
approaches.name: State-change-only alerting
approaches.summary: Only emit alerts when condition's state has changed since last emit. Cooldown is secondary.

approaches.question: Q7
approaches.name: VISTA Vision-Language for stock forecasting (positive)
approaches.summary: Training-free framework prompting VLM with both numeric series text and line chart. Reports up to 89.83% improvement over text-only baselines.
approaches.applicability: partial (multi-day stock; doesn't transfer cleanly to intraday crypto)

approaches.question: Q7
approaches.name: Antonov vision-LLM candlestick audit (decisive negative)
approaches.summary: 4 frontier VLMs from Anthropic + Google, 215 chart calls. 51% direction accuracy (chance), 1/215 patterns recognized correctly, 100% long-bias on Gemini.

approaches.question: Q7
approaches.name: Multi-scale benchmark for VLM candlestick comprehension
approaches.summary: VLMs perform well only under persistent uptrend/downtrend; weak in range markets. Strong prediction biases. Limited horizon sensitivity.
approaches.note: Crypto is RANGE-dominated 72% — exactly where VLMs fail

approaches.question: Q7
approaches.name: VLM visual arithmetic limitations
approaches.summary: Pre-trained vision encoders fail on length comparison, angle estimation, area comparison — primitives needed to read candlesticks.

top_3_recommendations.name: Reliability-diagram diagnostic + post-hoc calibration
top_3_recommendations.what_it_does: Decisively determines whether forecast Brier=0.247 reflects no-skill (decommission justified) or miscalibration (rescue path).
implementation_path: TZ-FORECAST-CALIBRATION-DIAGNOSTIC — pull historical (prob_up, observed_outcome) pairs; reliability diagram; Brier decomposition.
If reliability dominates: try Platt/isotonic on out-of-sample window.
Operator + MAIN read findings; choose A/B/C path for forecast pipeline.
top_3_recommendations.follow_up: None to start. Diagnostic itself is cheap.

top_3_recommendations.name: ATR%-based volatility regime as second axis to activation matrix
top_3_recommendations.what_it_does: Extends regulation §3 from 3-regime to 6-regime (trend × volatility); each existing CONDITIONAL cell gains a volatility precondition.
implementation_path: TZ-VOLATILITY-REGIME-OVERLAY — extract atr_14 + realized_vol_pctile_24h; classify hourly into LowVol/HighVol.
Update REGULATION_v0_1_1 §3 with conditional rules tied to second axis.

top_3_recommendations.name: Information-theoretic (KL-divergence) alert filtering layer
top_3_recommendations.what_it_does: Adds KL(window_now || baseline) score per alert; scores alert 'interestingness' beyond rule-based dedup.
implementation_path: TZ-ALERT-KL-SCORING-DIAGNOSTIC — implement rolling KL on selected features; replay 30d alerts; report distribution.
If approved: TZ-ALERT-KL-SCORING-INTEGRATION — wire as DecisionLogAlertWorker enrichment.

anti_recommendations.name: Vision LLMs to read candlestick charts
AI-TEW ML alert thresholds before labels
ICT killzone narrative without local backtest

open_questions: Public live-results dataset for FreqTrade-vs-Hummingbot-vs-Jesse with regime filters
Modern (post-2020) crypto-specific HMM vs naive baselines
Median Brier score for live retail forecast feeds in crypto
Practical KL-divergence threshold selection for trading alerts (Rec #3 diagnostic addresses)
Empirical solo-operator cognitive-load surveys for trading
Intraday-crypto adaptation of VISTA-style vision-augmented forecasting
